title: Leave Policy
content: Employees are entitled to 20 paid leave days per year. Leave requests must be submitted through the HR portal at least 3 days in advance.

title: Password Reset
content: Users can reset their password from Settings > Security > Reset Password. A verification email will be sent to confirm the request.

title: Work From Home Policy
content: Employees are allowed to work from home up to 2 days per week with prior approval from their reporting manager.

title: Refund Policy
content: Customers may request a full refund within 30 days of purchase if the product remains unused and in original condition.

title: Office Timings
content: Standard office working hours are from 9:00 AM to 6:00 PM, Monday through Friday.
